name: tri-square
comment: The regular palette restricted to triangles and squares. Enumerates the edge-to-edge k-uniform tilings that use only {3, 4}. Built 2026-07-22 as an independent cross-check of Marek's pt_triangles_squares_edges solver: the digon-free (nothing-drawn) solutions of his combined freedraw search ARE exactly these tilings, and he reports 4 / 7 / 17 at k = 1 / 2 / 3. Same mirror-merge convention on both sides (A068599 style), so the counts are directly comparable. See experiments/results/freedraw-pt-run-2026-07-22.md.
